notes:
Bluetooth controls — the real fix.

The earlier tries didn't work on real devices. Researched it properly: it's a known Android bug with text-to-speech, and the audio library ships an official workaround for exactly it that I'd been reinventing by hand.

Your headset, car and lock screen play/pause and chapter skip should now work, and it keeps playing with the screen off or when you leave the app.

Please test with your real Bluetooth headset and let me know if play/pause and skip work — that's the one thing the emulator can't test.

Also includes Daisy Novel + all of v2.23.
